title: SELECTION AND ISOLATION OF PLANT-ASSOCIATED METHANOTROPHIC BACTERIA BY A RAPID SCREENING PROCEDURE
author: João Victor Rego Ferreira
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A rapid screening procedure was used for the selection and isolation of plant-associated bacteria. 
The results indicated that methanol medium containing crystal violet might have potential 
application for selective isolation of methanotrophic bacteria from rhizosphere.
steps_raw:
